data.feedback: Not really an issue but I wanted to comment that knowing that there's a set amount of rounds allows participants to decide to be selfish on the last round without repercussion. So, near the middle of the game, I chose to go all; in and punish others who were still only contributing a small amount. At the end I realized that it made the most sense to use all of my coins for each round to get the max amount of coins for everyone.
